channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: O/s 89 by wall on Brondesbury villas, 26th May
item.description:
Fly tipping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: 7 Lordship Lane litter bin overflowing with waste, 26th May
item.description:
Litter bin outside 7 Lordship Lane needs emptying.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.description:
The bin outside 72 Grove Vale is overflowing with waste and needs emptying.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 72, Grove Vale, East Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Black graffiti tag on bridge, 26th May
item.description:
More graffiti appearing on North side of bridge over Deptford Creek.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford

item.title: Plastic waste, 26th May
item.description:
A local resident dumped some plastic item by the street pole.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lesney Park Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bag of clothes, 26th May
item.description:
It seems to have been stuffed ibto a "charity collection bag" which was sitting outside of an HMO at No1 Lesney Park road. Now they have dumped it outside 1a Lesney Park Road on or around 23 May. Some baby/child clothes are visible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victoria Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overgrown over the footpath, 26th May
item.description:
The pavement on Relf Road is very hard to walk down because of the very overgrown tree. I’m personally 6 foot 4 and it forces me to walk into the road instead of walking down the pavement. Please this tree needs to be trimmed to make the pavement easy to walk down it’s a really bad nuisance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Relf Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: ASB report by NHW group: Fp38 illegal driving motorcycle within public footpath, 26th May
item.description:
23:48gmt Neigbours report motorcyle/scooter being driven from Station Approach, down fp38, exit onto Northall Road. Vehicle rapidly sped down towards Parkside. Too dark to get good visuals upon make or livery. NB: This marks possibly 80th incident of this within last 3years, Some are doing this for TakeAway deliveries, others as short-cut from Erith Road, however many traverse the footpath at speeds which could endanger commuters & general public.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): FP38, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two sofas on pavement since 05 May, 25th May
item.description:
Two grey sofas from 314 maurer court were left on the pavement for 20 days
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mudlarks Boulevard, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 25th May
item.description:
There is a deceased animal in the road (appears to be a fox).

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingswood Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing Fly-tipping, 25th May
item.description:
Hi there, Please keep a close eye on the bottom of the Victoria Way as this stop is constantly used as a fly-tipping area. Kindly remove this asap and perhaps install a sign that fly-tipping is a crime or add CCTV in the area. Best, L

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead dog, 25th May
item.description:
Dead dog between jct 6 and 7 on the fast lane saw it at 2.45pm
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): M11, Epping, Epping Forest
Report on FixMyStreet
